title: File:The_"X"_signature_on_the_Celebrity_Eclipse,_Tallinn,_Estonia_-_26_June_2011.jpg
description: The "X" signature of Celebrity Cruises displayed on the funnel of the Celebrity Eclipse ship, photographed while it was in Tallinn, Estonia.

visual_verification.method: Manual Read-tool inspection of the .webp by the operator (or operator-supervised agent), 2026-05-14
visual_verification.note: Celebrity "X" funnel logo close-up; the X mark appears on every Celebrity ship, not Eclipse-specific. Commons uploader claims same-day Tallinn series as the confirmed name-sign shot
